response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned senior engineer with broad full-stack experience, strong testing/craftsmanship discipline, and some relevant geospatial work (GISCollective, Green Map, FOSS4G talk). However, the role centers on modern C++ (or Rust) for routing-tile pipelines, and the resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint a decade ago at National Instruments and no Rust. Primary recent experience is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, which is a significant gap against the core technical requirement.
strengths: Hands-on geospatial/GIS platform experience (GISCollective, Open Green Map, FOSS4G talk)
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, low-latency systems at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby
Senior-level breadth across backend, distributed systems, and Linux server applications
concerns: No demonstrated modern C++ experience; last C/C++ role was 2014–2015 at National Instruments
No direct routing/navigation or map-tile pipeline experience
